retrieved_result: How to Add Color to a Fluorescent Light Edit Article How to Add Color to a Fluorescent Light The cold, harsh light of fluorescent lamps fails to bring warmth to a room, nor is it decorative. By using inexpensive materials, you can add color and warmth to these boring lights to make your drab room or office welcoming, fun, fresh, and funk
